headline: Account Risk Review — Executive Briefing
narrative_paragraph: Our analysis of this account highlights a pattern that requires immediate executive attention. While product adoption metrics remain strong, relationship signals point to unresolved concerns that have been building for several quarters without formal resolution.
key_findings: Strong product adoption across all measured dimensions
NPS verbatim feedback reflects negative experiences not captured in scores
Unresolved operational concerns require structured resolution plan
Renewal risk elevated without immediate intervention
